/usr/bin/c++ -pthread -Wl,-z,defs -fvisibility=hidden -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/my_hpx_program.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/my_hpx_program.dir/main.cpp.o -o my_hpx_program  -Wl,-rpath,/home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib:/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib/libhpx_iostreams.so.1.10.0 /home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib/libhpx_wrap.a -Wl,-wrap=main /home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib/libhpx_init.a /home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib/libhpx.so.1.10.0 /home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib/libhpx_core.so /usr/lib/libtcmalloc_minimal.so /usr/lib/libmpi.so /usr/lib/libhwloc.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/librt.a /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublas.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublasLt.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libculibos.a -ldl -lrt
